title: The Shame-Identity Nexus: Why Smart People Keep Hitting the Same Ceiling
excerpt: Not a mindset problem. An architectural one. Why intelligent, capable people can remain structurally stuck while correctly identifying every external cause and missing the root.

title: What Is the Superhuman OS?
excerpt: A framework for the founder who has done everything right and is still hitting the same ceiling. The internal disorder and the external dysfunction are the same problem at different altitudes.
